title: Buck Im Here to Fuck
lyrics: I don't know which way I go inside my brain, inside my doom I just carry on the fractured of a broken home Which way I go left, which way I go next It's just a seal from the moment I was born without zeal With the next flow, just an old flow Just somebody that didn't know his own road So I brought it to you wanting to fuck Now the girls all look at me like I ain't got nothing left but bucks Money, broken home, I'm funny Oh no, it's just a little bit of that honey Got the gold, got the gold, got the gold, got the gold Don't take it away, take it away from me Don't take my man away from me Insolence, it's hard to start to understand It's just so thin, it's just a pencil to nothing I know I'm like a wafer and it can't eat me Not like the Christ skins and, Christ skins And I see Christ in the skin And then I be the eager beaver, wanna eat it Every day I come, I'm like a yellow wolf, a Caspian inside my brain But you think it's nasty, nasty Even if I'm gonna bring it good luck, you think I'm nasty You think I'm just one of those guys who wants it Smell you all over, watch you eat from me Smell you all over, I can smell your blood dripping down your thigh Newborn disguise Oh, tripping down your thighs, wetting me with slime Ventures I can't hide I know you know that I'm out there Stake it more, stake it more You can taste it on me, smell it on me, love it on me, eat it on me You want some of that good, good love Look it up and taste it from the sound of blood My ancestors brought me this war And you will be here just for sure I don't know what we fight, I just wanna fuck I just wanna do it all night, fuck rest I need Hold, hold, you're killing me there Won't go where you think I will Violence teaches you, yes, it's your enemy Like it when you eat it, love you like your sex, your pain Oh, now you don't know her name And you're just some random other little animal Attracted to me, just violence In my eyes, it's like a movie Anymore, has it more? You're the one that they call home I'm that number one You can call me, you can hide me You can call me, but you won't find me I'm the shit in the maze I'm taking up your best and your worst ways I'm taking the clothes off of my mind And now you see the reality It's a fucking crime, but I dare to you to say You can do it anytime Remember that you're like the I want you, I want you The game changed my, I lost my Sense too, got the marbles on, baby There's a whisky, don't miss, it's a whisky shower You wanna come with me, it's just a little towel shower Cause I'm sad and I can't find my own peace Just grounded in life, I know I'm a disease And butt comes around, just a little hollow To tell you it's just a hollow and you're done It's on your mind if you come with just a Darkness abiding, it can't you see it? It's a great moment, don't run, hide and view it Like the cross upon a cross, turn it upside down You got a different thing, different heart Different boss, different fart Old ways, lost at old ways Don't say those words, don't be new I'm misbehaving, carl thrott motherfucker Do your job, do your shit, work hard bitch And maybe you won't decide It is that summertime Cause I've found it doesn't matter If you rhyme or if you're buck And you're here to motherfucking fuck And he's here to fuck And he's here to fuck And he's here to fuck
